title: 第二幕　今宵,世界は素晴らしく

text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's explosive rise in popularity doesn't
show any signs of flagging even after the classic
races are done.

Clips of her races are garnering hundreds of
thousands of views, and new articles on her are
published seemingly every day.

The hashtag "#PiningForFuji" begins circulating
on social media, and everyone is impatient to see
what's next in her career.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me... Do you have a moment?

I recognize her as the younger student who spilled
her heart and sorrows out to Fuji Kiseki before.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I've been watching your races all this time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know. I've seen you in the stands at every single
one.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was so happy because it told me that you're
moving forward too!

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It's not like that... not really. At first, I only went
to watch you out of desperation...

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But when I saw how earnestly you ran every race, I
realized just how pathetic I was.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I was being petulant. I kept mourning my
inaptitude and throwing pity parties for myself.
But it had nothing to do with my lack of ability.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
What I really lacked was the determination to
decide what I wanted for my future once and for
all.

Her face lights up and she looks relieved as she
confesses this.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I've finally decided what path I want to take, and
it's thanks to you that I was able to change my
way of thinking.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah! Wow, really? I'm beyond honored to
hear that!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All this time, I've been hoping I could open up a
path for you all. That desire was what motivated
me to keep going.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So, what I mean to say is...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I hope from the bottom of my heart that your
days will be filled with joy. May your future
overflow with smiles.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

Fuji Kiseki waves farewell to the younger student
with a smile. I'm still wondering about why she
blanked out earlier, though...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, then! There's something I want to talk to
you about, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Is it okay if we head back to your office?
She looks cheerful as ever as she asks me that.

I shake off the odd feeling, and we make for my
office together.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know we've talked about this before, but I want
to solidify my plans for senior year.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to show everyone anticipating my races
what lies beyond the performances I gave them as
a classic runner!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to create a new miracle. I want to take on
the truly impossible and conquer all the odds!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And if you're wondering how I plan to do that,
well...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There's something that all runners are constrained
by. That goes for the pony we just saw as well as
for me.
choice_data_list: Are you talking about your distance aptitude?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It's an inescapable constraint, but it's the
reason why I want to challenge myself even more
than I did as a classic racer!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If I do manage to break down that barrier, don't
you think it'll make for the most wonderful show
ever?
choice_data_list: You can't be implying what I think you are!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to conquer the G1 field by taking on
four races of varying distances!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
First up in a sprint, with the 1,200-meter
Takamatsunomiya Kinen. Then a mile, with the
1,600-meter Yasuda Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Followed by the medium-distance autumn Tenno
Sho at 2,000 meters, and finally, the Arima
Kinen, at a whopping 2,500 meters!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I aim to dominate every single one of those
heart-stopping races!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Everyone will think I'm being absurd and
unreasonable...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But there's no way I can leave such a
preposterous challenge uncontested, now is
there?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What do you think? I do hope you're on board.

There's no way I can disagree with her, not when
she's looking at me with such eagerness. Besides...
choice_data_list:
I have a feeling you'll be able to accomplish
that dream.

I have a feeling you'll be able to accomplish
that dream.

text_block_list.text:
As a classic racer, she managed to thrill people
with performances far beyond the threshold she
originally set for herself.

And if she can do that, then nothing is impossible
for Fuji Kiseki, not even the most unrealistic
challenge in the world.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I knew in my heart you would say that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to drag our feet now that we've
gotten that out of the way. Let's get this show on
the road right away!

The following day, every media outlet announces
Fuji Kiseki's official agenda for her senior year.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, look! They're doing a feature on the races
Fuji Kiseki will be taking on!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Expert
text_block_list.text:
It's extremely difficult to run in four races of
differing lengths because runners have different
distance aptitudes.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Expert
text_block_list.text:
Take Sakura Bakushin O, for example. She's what
is considered a model sprinter.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Expert
text_block_list.text:
She exhibits overwhelming power in races under
1,400 meters.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Expert
text_block_list.text: Next, let's look at Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Expert
text_block_list.text:
All the graded races she has won are over 2,500
meters. She's what we call a superb stayer.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Expert
text_block_list.text:
So what decides the distances that an
Umamusume excels at?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Expert
text_block_list.text:
Well, it depends on the ratio of slow-twitch
versus fast-twitch fibers in their muscles, just like
in human athletes.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Expert
text_block_list.text:
Fast-twitch fibers contract and tire quickly.
Having more of these allows one to put on quick
energy bursts, so those athletes tend to be better
sprinters.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Expert
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, slow-twitch fibers are slower
to contract and slower to tire as well, so...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Huh, so a runner's distance aptitude is
determined at birth?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
So not even all the training in the world can
change it? That must be tough.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
I think that makes Fuji even more amazing! It's
like she's defying nature and living life on her own
terms!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
True. It's as awesome as a humble farmer
becoming the unifier of a country or the shortest
kid on a volleyball team being the ace spiker.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...All right! I've got to do my best!

Expectations for Fuji Kiseki's senior year are
rising even higher.
